ideation: This sequence will show the robot experiencing a light breeze.  The animation will start with arms at the sides, then move to arms slightly raised, and finally return to the rest position, suggesting the feeling of a gentle wind. Frame 1 will be a neutral pose; Frame 2 will have the arms slightly raised and tilted back, as if feeling the wind; Frame 3 will return to a neutral position. This will showcase the gentle nature of the wind without being too dramatic.

frames.beat: arms hang relaxed, a moment of calm
arms lift slightly, feeling a gentle breeze
arms return to rest, the wind passes
